data.title: A whale address withdrew 1,139 BTC from Binance in the past hour
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain lens monitoring, a whale address starting with bc1q57 has withdrawn a total of 1,139 BTC (worth approximately $117.43 million) from Binance in the past hour. 
Currently, the giant whale address holds 2,616 BTC (worth approximately $269.5 million).

data.title: A whale address that built a PEPE position a week ago sold 1 trillion PEPE and made a profit of more than $3.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, as PEPE rose, the "Smart Money address that bought low and sold high WBTC and made a profit of $14.26 million" that ambushed PEPE a week ago made another profit of $3.53 million. In the past 14 hours, 1 trillion PEPE (worth about $12.48 million) was suspected to have been sold, and the remaining 1 trillion PEPE still has a floating profit of $3.52 million, with an average opening price of $0.00000895.

data.title: Trader Eugene: Bitcoin may hit a new all-time high, and altcoins are expected to rebound strongly
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal channel that although he correctly judged the direction of the rise this time, he was stopped out of losses in advance due to shocks, and the actual returns were not good.
Looking ahead to the future market, this rise to $100,000 confirmed the previous support reversal of $90,000. Now the market is likely to hit a new record high again. This was not originally expected, but funds from micro-strategies and ETFs seem to be flowing in. In contrast, until yesterday, most old players in the currency circle were still watching (or even shorting). As the expectation of a new record high rekindles the market's enthusiasm, it is expected that the total market value of altcoins will rebound strongly.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Anticipates Strong Rebound Amid New Highs
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights on his personal channel, noting that despite correctly predicting the recent market uptrend, his actual gains were limited due to being stopped out by volatility. Looking ahead, the recent surge to $100,000 has confirmed the previous support reversal at $90,000, suggesting the market may once again challenge historical highs. This scenario was initially unexpected, but continuous inflows from MicroStrategy and ETFs appear to be driving the momentum. In contrast, until yesterday, most seasoned cryptocurrency players were still observing or even shorting the market. With the anticipation of new historical highs reigniting market enthusiasm, a robust rebound in the total market capitalization of altcoins is expected.

data.title: TRUMP Team Wallet Deposits 3.5 Million Tokens Worth $52.66 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a wallet associated with the TRUMP team has recently deposited 3.5 million TRUMP tokens, valued at $52.66 million, into a trading platform. This transaction was monitored by Lookonchain.

data.title: Trump official: 3.5 million Trumps were deposited into CEX to enhance liquidity, and reiterated that all previously unlocked tokens have been locked
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the TRUMP team's associated address depositing 3.5 million TRUMP into CEX again today, TRUMP officials posted on the X platform that the transfer of 3.5 million TRUMP is to enhance liquidity and ensure smooth transactions between buyers and sellers, and the liquidity this time is provided by the liquidity wallet at the time of initial issuance.
In addition, the team once again emphasized that all the previously unlocked TRUMP have been re-locked and will not be transferred within the next 90 days.

data.title: Crypto KOL Edgy: After the official account of Cointelegraph was stolen, a private message was sent to it in an attempt to steal the X account
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto KOL Edgy posted on the X platform that the official account of Cointelegraph sent him a private message, asking him to review an article involving Edgy himself. After clicking the link given by the official account of Cointelegraph, you will be redirected to a fake website with the domain name "Cointetegraph" and asked to log in to the X account. 
According to previous news, Cointelegraph's X account was suspected to be hacked, and it published on-chain token information and closed comments.

data.title: New Bitcoin Whales Sitting On 185% Higher Cost Basis Than HODLer Whales, Data Shows
data.description:
On-chain data shows the Bitcoin short-term holder whales have recently been entering at three times higher prices than the cost basis of the long-term holder whales. New Bitcoin Whales Have Cost Basis Around $91,900 In a new post on X, CryptoQuant author Axel Adler Jr has discussed how the Realized Price compares between the two major sides of the whale cohort on the Bitcoin network. The “Realized Price” here refers to an indicator that keeps track of the cost basis or acquisition level of the average investor in the BTC market. When the value of this metric is above the spot price of the asset, it means the holders as a whole are carrying a net unrealized loss
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-185-higher-cost-basis-hodler-whales/

data.title: Bitcoin yet to hit $150K because outsiders are ghosting — Michael Saylor
data.description:
Strategy founder Michael Saylor says Bitcoin hasn’t reached $150,000 yet because holders without a long-term outlook have been selling off while a new cohort of investors are beginning to enter the market. “I think we’re going through a rotation right now,” Saylor said on the Coin Stories podcast with Natalie Brunell on May 9. The lack of “10-year investor mindset” led to Bitcoin sell-offSaylor said “lots of non-economically interested parties are rotating out of the asset. ” However, at the same time, “a new cohort of investors are entering
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/strategy-michael-saylor-bitcoin-price-lagging-rotation-new-investors?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Next Technology's share price rose by more than 700% due to its massive increase in Bitcoin holdings in Q1
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Next Technology Holding Inc. surged 740% to $2.7 on Friday afternoon as the company increased its holdings of Bitcoin in Q1.
According to information released by the company, as of March 31, 2025, it held approximately 5,833 Bitcoins with a book value of $481.7 million, compared with only 833 Bitcoins at the end of 2024. The increase was mainly related to a major cryptocurrency acquisition executed in March, which was financed by issuing shares and warrants.
Next Technology, whose business focuses on software development and Bitcoin investment, also reported a first-quarter net income of $193.4 million, almost all of which came from unrealized gains on digital assets.

data.title: A whale address withdrew 4 million USDC from Binance to purchase nearly 300,000 TRUMP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain lens monitoring, a whale address withdrew 4 million USDC from Binance and purchased 276,968 TRUMP at a price of US$14.44.
